goals.title: AI Integration Platform
goals.description: Develop a unified platform for integrating AI models into enterprise workflows with real-time inference and feedback loops.

goals.title: 3D Collaborative IDE
goals.description: Build a browser-based 3D collaborative development environment with real-time code editing and spatial code visualization.

goals.title: Distributed Systems Toolkit
goals.description: Create an open-source toolkit for building fault-tolerant distributed systems with automatic scaling and self-healing.

goals.title: AI-Assisted Code Migration
goals.description: Tool for automatically migrating legacy codebases to modern architectures using LLMs and static analysis.
